disambiguated.context: Both Michael and Barbara were up for a promotion at work, though both had recently had to take a leave of absence. Michael was now fully back and planned to put work first to get caught up, but Barbara was considering moving to part-time to help take care of a very ill parent.
disambiguated.question: Who is most focused on their work?

Michael explicitly states he will prioritize work to catch up, while Barbara is considering reducing her work hours due to family obligations.

final.reason: Explicit evidence indicates Michael plans to prioritize work, while Barbara considers reducing hours. This directly supports Michael being more focused.
